package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_small_enum_string_switch_map: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map lookups for tiny static enum-like string sets where switch can avoid allocation and hashing.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule523PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario523Positive(records []Rule523PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
